summary: COMPREHENSIVE ADMIN PANEL AUDIT - All 28 requested tabs tested. 28/28 tabs PASS. Admin panel fully functional across all 7 main sections (COMMAND CENTER, MEMBERS & PETS, COMMERCE, 14 PILLARS, MIRA & AI, ANALYTICS, CONFIG).

minor.issue: Console error: 'Error fetching app settings: TypeError: Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read' seen on Pricing tab load

critical_code_review_comments: All admin tabs load correctly without JavaScript errors (except minor console warning on Pricing tab)
Admin panel has proper data-testid attributes for most tabs enabling reliable automated testing
Some tabs in 14 PILLARS section missing data-testid attributes - required JavaScript-based clicking
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel fully audited. All 28 tabs verified working. Use data-testid selectors for main tabs, JavaScript clicks for 14 PILLARS tabs.
